message:
Add 'bd done' as alias for 'bd close'

Natural verb for marking completed work. `bd done <id> "message"` now works
as a convenience alias for `bd close <id> -m "message"`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ import (
 
 var closeCmd = &cobra.Command{
 	Use:     "close [id...]",
+	Aliases: []string{"done"},
 	GroupID: "issues",
 	Short:   "Close one or more issues",
 	Long: `Close one or more issues.
